name: Spinach Lasagna (Lappe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté onion, garlic, tomatoes, and mushrooms until the onions are translucent. Add herbs.
4. Chop spinach and add it to the skillet; stir until wilted. Simmer for a few minutes.
5. In a bowl, combine cheeses (except reserved mozzarella). Mix vegetables into the cheese mixture thoroughly.
6. Layer noodles alternately with vegetable-cheese mix in an 8x13-inch baking pan.
7. Top with reserved mozzarella and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
8. Let sit for 5 to 10 minutes before serving.
